title: Midnight-Craving Canadian Vermicelli Stir
description: A yeasty, molten dish that's perfect for satisfying your midnight cravings. Featuring vermicelli pasta in a stir-fry with a unique blend of Canadian flavors.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the vermicelli pasta according to the package instructions.
In a separate saucepan, melt 2 tablespoons of butter over medium heat.
Add the flour and whisk together to make a roux, cooking for 1-2 minutes.
Slowly pour in the beer, whisking constantly to avoid lumps.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes, until it thickens.
Add the grated Gruyère cheese and stir until melted and smooth.
In a separate pan, cook the bacon bits until crispy.
Add the cooked vermicelli pasta to the cheese sauce and toss to coat.
Stir in the cooked bacon, parsley, garlic powder, onion powder, and paprika.
Transfer the pasta mixture to a fondue pot and heat over low heat, stirring occasionally.
In a separate bowl, beat the eggs and mix with the mascarpone cheese until smooth.
Add the egg mixture to the pasta and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the eggs are set and the pasta is heated through.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
Cook in a vessel with a temperature of 375°F (190°C).
